display.purpose: Hero and final-CTA headlines only. Set huge, crosses column lines.

title.purpose: Card titles, track names, pillar words.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, protocol labels, KPI readouts, the [OTP] wordmark.

shadows.name: floating-panel
shadows.purpose: The only resting shadow. Under panels that genuinely float (hero chart panel, install card).

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover lifts and state transitions. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: hover-lift
motion.purpose: Buttons and cards rise on hover. Motion signals elevation instead of a shadow.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one committed action per view. Signal amber, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-block; background:#ffab1d; color:#17130d; font-family:Archivo,sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:15px; padding:14px 28px; border:none; border-radius:7px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .18s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), transform .18s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#ff8a12; transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #ffab1d; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The secondary action on dark surfaces. Bordered, never competes with primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-block; background:transparent; color:#f4ecda; font-family:Archivo,sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:15px; padding:14px 28px; border:1px solid rgba(244,236,218,0.12); border-radius:7px; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color .18s, background .18s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color:#ffab1d; background:rgba(255,171,29,0.06); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #ffab1d; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Org Tile
components.description: Signature component. A seat on the org chart. Full border, swatch plus monospace HUMAN/AGENT tag, never a side stripe.
components.html:
Human
David Steel
CEO
components.css: .ds-org-tile { background:#2c2618; border:1px solid rgba(244,236,218,0.12); border-radius:7px; padding:11px 12px 12px; width:150px; } .ds-org-tile-head { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-bottom:6px; } .ds-org-tile-swatch { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:1px; background:#ffab1d; } .ds-org-tile-tag { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:8.5px; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#a99c7f; } .ds-org-tile-name { font-family:Archivo,sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:13px; color:#f4ecda; line-height:1.1; } .ds-org-tile-role { font-size:10.5px; color:#a99c7f; margin-top:2px; }

components.name: Track Card
components.description: Onboarding track card. Flat at rest, border shifts to amber and the card lifts on hover.
components.html:
01L1 → L3
Build the Foundation
Start the track →
components.css: .ds-track-card { display:block; background:#221d14; border:1px solid rgba(244,236,218,0.12); border-radius:12px; padding:28px; text-decoration:none; transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), border-color .2s; } .ds-track-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px); border-color:#ffab1d; } .ds-track-card-head { display:flex; align-items:baseline; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:24px; } .ds-track-card-num { font-family:Archivo,sans-serif; font-weight:900; font-size:5rem; line-height:0.7; color:#2c2618; } .ds-track-card-range { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#ffab1d; } .ds-track-card-title { font-family:Archivo,sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:1.5rem; color:#f4ecda; margin-bottom:12px; } .ds-track-card-cta { font-family:Archivo,sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:14px; color:#ffab1d; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Monospace section marker with a solid amber tick. Opens every section.
components.html: Operating protocol for the augmented organization
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.22em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#a99c7f; } .ds-eyebrow-tick { width:7px; height:7px; background:#ffab1d; flex:none; }

components.name: Index Row
components.description: Editorial list row. Replaces identical card grids. Outlined numeral, title plus description, monospace action.
components.html: 01OOS Starter TemplateA commented YAML you fill in to describe your organization.Download →
components.css: .ds-index-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:auto 1fr auto; gap:40px; align-items:center; padding:24px 8px; text-decoration:none; border-top:1px solid rgba(34,28,17,0.14); transition:background .15s; } .ds-index-row:hover { background:#efe7d3; } .ds-index-num { font-family:Archivo,sans-serif; font-weight:900; font-size:2.4rem; line-height:1; -webkit-text-stroke:1.5px #6f6450; color:transparent; } .ds-index-row:hover .ds-index-num { -webkit-text-stroke-color:#b06c08; } .ds-index-title { font-family:Archivo,sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:1.15rem; color:#221c11; } .ds-index-desc { display:block; font-family:Inter,sans-serif; font-size:13px; color:#6f6450; margin-top:4px; } .ds-index-action { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#b06c08; white-space:nowrap; }

narrative.overview: OTP is the Organization Transport Protocol, and the design takes that word literally. The system looks like transit signage: signal amber burning on warm ink, monospaced protocol labels, type set large enough to read at a glance, every element sitting in a clear slot. A departure board does not decorate; it tells you exactly where things are and where they are going, with total confidence, in one look. The personality is founder-direct and structural: enormous declarative headlines in a heavy grotesk, monospaced labels and data because OTP is a protocol, committed color that always points at the one thing that matters. It rejects cheerful startup pastel and enterprise software grey alike. Warmth comes from honesty and the founder's voice; seriousness comes from structure and restraint.
keyCharacteristics: Committed color: signal amber owns surfaces, never decorates.
Warm ink and warm paper. No cold grey, no #000, no #fff.
Heavy editorial display type at dramatic scale, against monospaced protocol labels.
Flat surfaces, full borders, tonal layering. Depth is structural, not glassy.
Every seat, label, and number sits in a legible slot. Signage logic.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Amber always points at something: an action, a live state, a human, the one word that carries the sentence. If amber is not pointing at something, it does not belong on the surface.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. Every neutral is tinted warm toward the amber hue. Cold grey is the enterprise-grey anti-reference and is prohibited.

rules.name: The Two-Temperature Rule
rules.body: Sections alternate ink and paper. There is no third surface temperature. Amber alone may break the alternation, only by flooding a whole section on purpose.

rules.name: The Mono Label Rule
rules.body: Every eyebrow, label, KPI, and data readout is set in JetBrains Mono. OTP is a literal protocol and the mono says so. Never a decorative dev-tool gesture.

rules.name: The Scale Jump Rule
rules.body: The step from Display to Body is dramatic, three times or more. Flat type scales are forbidden.

rules.name: The Solid Emphasis Rule
rules.body: A word is emphasized by switching it to solid Signal Amber, or by weight. Never by a gradient.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Structure is drawn with a full border and tonal steps, never with a shadow.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: Glassmorphism, decorative backdrop-filter blur, and glass cards are forbidden. Panels are solid.

dos: Do keep Signal Amber (#ffab1d) pointed at something: an action, a live state, a human seat, one emphasized word. Let it carry whole surfaces when the section is a committed moment.
Do tint every neutral warm. Ink is #17130d, paper is #f7f2e6.
Do set headlines enormous in Archivo 900 and let them cross column lines.
Do set every label, KPI, and readout in JetBrains Mono. The mono is the protocol.
Do draw structure with full 1px borders and tonal steps (Ink to Ink Raised to Ink High), flat at rest.
Do mark org-chart seats with a swatch plus a monospace HUMAN / AGENT tag.
Do hold WCAG 2.2 AA: use Signal Deep (#b06c08) for amber text on paper, keep visible focus rings, honor prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't drift into cheerful startup pastel: no soft gradients, no friendly blobs, no rounded cuteness, no mascot warmth, no pastel fills.
Don't drift into enterprise software grey: no cold neutrals, no joyless corporate chrome, no point-of-view-free layouts.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe. Use a full border and a swatch.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Emphasize with solid Signal Amber or with weight.
Don't use glassmorphism or decorative backdrop-filter blur. Panels are solid.
Don't build the hero-metric template or endless identical icon-heading-text card grids. Use the Index Row instead.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, periods, or parentheses.
